Intel Inspires

Collaborating with Intel to bring high-level esports competition to rising high school and college stars.

For Intel, I created a motion graphics and video promo package for their high school and college esports summit "Intel Inspires." Featuring live LAN competitions, the three day event was attended by over 1,000 students. On location Esports Stadium Arlington, I provided Intel with a trove footage of everything from intense gameplay moments to behind-the-scenes interactions from this annual esports summit.

You can see some of the footage I shot and edited for Intel in the event sizzle above, as well as my motion graphics and editing work in the official event announcement and promo below.

  • Video Production
  • Videography

  • Video Editing

Footer

Let's Connect!

Hey there! If you're interested in connecting, like what you see on my site, or just want to talk about animation / video editing & production, please feel free to get in touch! I love connecting with fellow creators, and anyone looking to put my skills to good use.

I'm especially enthusiastic about collaborating on projects that prioritize social impact and humanitarian efforts. If your work aims to promote equality and tackle social issues, I would love to connect and explore how we can work together.

I enjoy having my creative capabilities challenged. If you don't see an exact example of what you're looking for within my portfolio, know that research and development are my forte, and I have a knack for finding creative solutions to problems. If you'd like to just send me a friendly message, shoot me an email!
